title: Range Slider
description: A range slider with single/dual modes, horizontal/vertical orientations, step and snap options, and optional tooltips/labels. Extends MXInteractiveComponent and MXBaseComponent.

sections.title: Snap Modes
sections.description: Different snap display modes (start, end, both).

sections.title: Tooltip Modes
sections.description: Different tooltip display modes and positions.

sections.title: Colors
sections.description: Different color themes (primary, success, warning, danger).

sections.title: Snap Labels
sections.description: With and without snap point labels.

props.name: disabled
props.description: If set to true, disables the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: Specifies the tabindex of the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: readonly
props.description: If set to true, user cannot change the value of component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: name
props.description: Name identifier for the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: dirty
props.description: Indicates whether the component value has been modified. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: state
props.description: Current state of the component (clear, success, error). Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: values
props.description: Single value or [start, end] in dual mode.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emitted when the disabled state changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: readonlyChange
events.description: Emitted when the readonly state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: stateChange
events.description: Emitted when the component state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Emitted when the component gets focused. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Emitted when the component gets blurred. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Emitted when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: onValueChanged
events.description: Emitted when the slider value changes.

methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 * @method getHostElement
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 * @method setOption
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void

/**
 * Focuses the component.
 * @method focus
 */
focus(): void

/**
 * Removes focus from the component.
 * @method blur
 */
blur(): void

/**
 * Checks if the component is focused or has any focused element.
 * @returns boolean - True if the component has focus.
 * @method hasFocus
 */
hasFocus(): boolean

/**
 * Sets the disabled state of the component (ControlValueAccessor method).
 * @param isDisabled - Whether the component should be disabled.
 * @method setDisabledState
 */
setDisabledState(isDisabled: boolean): void

/**
 * Commits a value with optional user interaction flag.
 * @param value - The value to commit.
 * @param u - Optional flag indicating if this is a user interaction.
 * @method commitValue
 */
commitValue(value: AXRangeSliderValue, u?: boolean): void

/**
 * Resets the component value.
 * @param e - Optional flag indicating if this is a user interaction.
 * @method reset
 */
reset(e?: boolean): void

/**
 * Resets validation errors.
 * @method resetErrors
 */
resetErrors(): void

/**
 * Marks the component as dirty.
 * @method markAsDirty
 */
markAsDirty(): void

/**
 * Increase a step to value if slider in single mode and increase a step for the second value if in dual mode.
 * @method increaseStep
 */
increaseStep(): void

/**
 * Decrease a step to value if slider in single mode and decrease a step for the second value if in dual mode.
 * @method decreaseStep
 */
decreaseStep(): void
